scripts.android: bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; SDK_ROOT="${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk}}"; EXTERNAL_ROOT="/Volumes/BACK UP"; EXTRA_ENV=""; if [[ -d "$EXTERNAL_ROOT" ]]; then mkdir -p "$EXTERNAL_ROOT/tmp" "$EXTERNAL_ROOT/gradle-home"; EXTRA_ENV="TMPDIR=\"$EXTERNAL_ROOT/tmp\" GRADLE_USER_HOME=\"$EXTERNAL_ROOT/gradle-home\""; fi; eval "$EXTRA_ENV EXPO_HOME=.expo-home ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=\"$SDK_ROOT\" ANDROID_HOME=\"$SDK_ROOT\" PATH=\"$SDK_ROOT/emulator-2:$SDK_ROOT/emulator:$SDK_ROOT/platform-tools:$PATH\" npx expo run:android"'
scripts.android:emu:install: cd android && TMPDIR="/Volumes/BACK UP/tmp" GRADLE_USER_HOME="/Volumes/BACK UP/gradle-home" ./gradlew :app:installDebug -PreactNativeArchitectures=x86_64 -x lint -x test --no-daemon
scripts.android:emu:open: bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; SDK_ROOT="${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk}}"; ADB="$SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb"; EMULATOR="$SDK_ROOT/emulator/emulator"; if [[ ! -x "$EMULATOR" ]]; then EMULATOR="$SDK_ROOT/emulator-2/emulator"; fi; if [[ ! -x "$ADB" ]]; then echo "adb introuvable: $ADB"; exit 1; fi; serial="$("$ADB" devices | awk "NR>1 && \$2==\"device\"{print \$1; exit}")"; if [[ -z "$serial" ]]; then if [[ ! -x "$EMULATOR" ]]; then echo "Aucun appareil/emulateur detecte et emulator introuvable: $SDK_ROOT/emulator/emulator ou $SDK_ROOT/emulator-2/emulator"; echo "Astuce: mets le SDK dans un chemin sans espaces (ex: /Users/Shared/Android/sdk) et exporte ANDROID_SDK_ROOT"; exit 1; fi; avd="$("$EMULATOR" -list-avds | grep -x "Pixel_Tablet" | head -n 1 || true)"; if [[ -z "$avd" ]]; then avd="$("$EMULATOR" -list-avds | head -n 1)"; fi; if [[ -z "$avd" ]]; then echo "Aucun AVD trouve. Cree un emulateur dans Android Studio (Device Manager), puis relance."; exit 1; fi; echo "Demarrage de l emulateur: $avd"; nohup "$EMULATOR" -avd "$avd" -netdelay none -netspeed full >/dev/null 2>&1 & disown || true; echo "Attente de l appareil..."; "$ADB" wait-for-device; for i in $(seq 1 120); do serial="$("$ADB" devices | awk "NR>1 && \$2==\"device\"{print \$1; exit}")"; if [[ -n "$serial" ]]; then boot="$("$ADB" -s "$serial" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d "\r" || true)"; if [[ "$boot" == "1" ]]; then break; fi; fi; sleep 1; done; fi; serial="$("$ADB" devices | awk "NR>1 && \$2==\"device\"{print \$1; exit}")"; if [[ -z "$serial" ]]; then echo "adb ne voit toujours aucun appareil (adb devices)."; exit 1; fi; "$ADB" -s "$serial" reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081; "$ADB" -s "$serial" shell am start -a android.intent.action.VIEW -d "exp+deadpions://expo-development-client/?url=http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%3A8081"'
scripts.android:gradle:reset: bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; cd android; ./gradlew --stop || true; cd ..; rm -rf android/.gradle android/build android/app/build node_modules/@react-native/gradle-plugin/.gradle; find node_modules -type d -path "*/android/build" -prune -exec rm -rf {} + || true'
scripts.ios: HOME=$PWD EXPO_HOME=.expo-home CP_HOME_DIR=ios/.cocoapods-home npx expo run:ios -d "iPhone 17 Pro"
scripts.ios:release:archive: xcodebuild -workspace ios/DeadPions.xcworkspace -scheme DeadPions -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos -archivePath ios/build/DeadPions.xcarchive archive
